name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit personal loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at a Detroit storefront location.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical lending location in Detroit, Michigan, specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions for consumers who need funds quickly. The company advertises a range of loan products marketed toward individuals with various credit profiles, including those with poor or no credit history. Their storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd provides in-person service with extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends), and they claim to facilitate approval and funding within hours.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans ($1,000 or less), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans for bad credit. All products are described as unsecured loans accepting "all credit types." Their stated benefits include minimal paperwork, no collateral requirements, and the ability to use funds for any purpose. The application process is described as an online inquiry form connected to third-party lenders, followed by offer review, contract signing, and cash distribution.

Customer reviews highlight fast processing times (under 45 minutes reported) and positive interactions with staff, particularly mention of a staff member named Doris. Reviews note transparency about repayment terms and describe the service as straightforward compared to expectations. However, reviews also mention practical facility limitations such as cramped waiting areas, and some reviewers appear to reference competitor names (Express Payday Loans) in their testimonials, suggesting potential review authenticity concerns.

While the company positions itself as accessible to bad credit borrowers, the website provides no information about interest rates, APRs, repayment terms, or specific fees. The footer contains a partial disclosure about underwriting review and APR/repayment period information that appears cut off. No details are provided about state licensing, regulatory compliance, or loan term lengths, making it impossible to verify whether rates comply with Michigan payday lending regulations.
pros: Reported processing time under 45 minutes for in-person applications
Accepts all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Extended operating hours including weekends (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends)
Unsecured loans with no collateral requirement
Loan amounts range from $100-$50,000 depending on product
Physical storefront location in Detroit for face-to-face service
Minimal paperwork process with clear staff communication per customer reviews
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on website
Incomplete regulatory/compliance disclosure (footer text cuts off)
Limited facility capacity (cramped waiting area noted in reviews)
Website contains apparent consistency issues (reviews mention competitor name 'Express Payday Loans')
No information about actual loan term lengths or repayment schedules
best_for: Individuals in Detroit needing same-day cash with poor or no credit history
Consumers who prefer in-person lending interactions and face-to-face guidance
Borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans who can visit a physical location
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area residents with poor credit who need emergency cash within hours and can visit the physical location in person. Critical caveat: the website lacks essential disclosures on interest rates, APRs, and specific loan terms, making it impossible to assess whether this lender's rates are reasonable or compliant with Michigan payday lending regulations—research current rates and terms directly before applying.
services: Online application and third-party lender connection
